name: Electricity Utilities
copTitle: Personal Data Protection Code of Practice (Utilities — Electricity) 2022

security.mfaScope: MFA for customer portals and AMI access
deltaFromBaseline: Annual security assessments for AMI/MDMS systems
Comprehensive audit logging for consumption data access
Smart meter interval data 13-month hard maximum

provisions.title: Smart Meter Data
provisions.summary: 15/30-min interval data reveals occupancy patterns; 13-month max retention

provisions.title: AMI Network Security
provisions.summary: Segregated networks for advanced metering infrastructure

provisions.title: Secondary Use Consent
provisions.summary: Energy programs, demand response, research require explicit consent

provisions.title: Debt Management
provisions.summary: Credit bureau reporting with pre-notification recommended
